text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is the ability of a computer or machine to perform tasks that normally require human intelligence. This includes learning from experience, understanding language, and solving problems. One important part of AI is machine learning, where computers learn patterns from data without being directly programmed. A more advanced form is deep learning, which uses complex networks inspired by the human brain to handle tasks like image recognition. You encounter AI in daily life often—for example, when your phone suggests the next word you want to type, when a streaming service recommends a movie, or when a virtual assistant answers your questions.
